articles.name: Bitunix to Launch SKHYUSDT in Perpetual Futures
articles.title: Bitunix to Launch SKHYUSDT in Perpetual Futures
articles.body:
Dear Bitunix Users,
 
Bitunix will launch SKHYUSDT in USDT-M Perpetual Futures at 2026-07-13 06:00 (UTC).
 
Underlying Equity:
SKHYUSDT: SK Hynix Inc. ADR
 
Supported leverage:
SKHYUSDT: 1x - 50x
 
Please Note:
⋅ Based on market risk conditions, Bitunix may adjust the parameters from time to time, which include the minimum price movement, maximum leverage, initial margin, and/or maintenance margin requirements.
⋅ The perpetual futures listed above are subject to the terms of the Bitunix Futures Services Agreement.
⋅ For more information about Bitunix stock perps, please refer to: Stock Perps Trading Guide
⋅ In the event of any discrepancies between the translated versions and the original English version, the English version shall take precedence.
 
Regards,
 
Bitunix Team
2026-07-11
